articles.author: Eric Mitchell
articles.title: Curlin Perseveres to Sire First Kentucky Derby Winner - BloodHorse
articles.description: The 22-year-old son of Smart Strike had sired three runners-up in the American classic since 2016.
articles.content:
No question, elite North American stallion Curlin 
  was more than due to become the sire of a Kentucky Derby (G1) winner, which he achieved May 2 when Golden Tempo  roared from off the pace in deep… [+3142 chars]
